product_highlights: AC Ferment™ series — advanced fermentation-derived bioactive compounds
Sustainable bio-actives with reduced environmental footprint
Comprehensive formulation support and application expertise
notes: Active Concepts is a US-based cosmetic ingredient supplier specializing in innovative and sustainable ingredients derived from biotechnology. Their AC Ferment™ series uses advanced fermentation processes to produce bioactive compounds with superior efficacy and sustainability profiles. Active Concepts' commitment to sustainable sourcing and biotechnology makes them a key supplier for brands seeking next-generation, eco-conscious formulations with clean ingredient profiles and strong performance credentials.
